steps.title: Set up total distance
steps.content:
Riley ran $r$ miles and biked $b$ miles for a total of $240$ miles.
$$r+b=240$$

steps.title: Use the time relationship
steps.content:
Time equals distance divided by speed. Biking time is twice running time.
$$\frac{b}{12}=2(\frac{r}{6})$$
$$\frac{b}{12}=\frac{r}{3}$$
$$b=4r$$

steps.title: Solve for biking miles
steps.content:
Substitute $b=4r$ into the distance equation.
$$r+4r=240$$
$$5r=240$$
$$r=48$$
$$b=4(48)=192$$
The answer is D.
